groups.label: Hypertensive heart and kidney disease
groups.recommendation: Review I11-I13 for a hypertension core plus heart-failure and CKD content variants; do not flatten organ involvement.

groups.label: Other mental and behavioral disorders
groups.recommendation: Prioritize substance-use, PTSD, obsessive-compulsive, and other persistent disorders; avoid one broad mental-health profile.

groups.label: Congenital and inherited disorders
groups.recommendation: The blanket congenital PASS rule creates a large rare-condition queue; review persistence and adult care burden by family before adding canonical IDs.
